tasks.action: Plant strawberry plugs (Ostara + Korona) in Bed A

prompt.en: Dig a hole, place the crown at soil level, press soil around it. You place each plug!
prompt.da: Grav et hul, saet kronen i jordniveau, tryk jorden fast. Du saetter hver plante!

tasks.action: Sow pea seeds along trellis in Bed C

prompt.en: Push each big seed into the hole -- you can do this one all by yourself!
prompt.da: Tryk hvert stort froe ned i hullet -- det kan du helt selv!

tasks.action: Plant violas and lamb's ear in Bed A sensory corners

prompt.en: Feel the lamb's ear leaf -- it's like a bunny ear! Put it in the corner.
prompt.da: Maaerk lammeoere-bladet -- det er som et kaninore! Saet det i hjoernet.

tasks.action: Plant thyme and lemon balm in Bed A and Bed D

prompt.en: Rub the thyme between your fingers -- what does it smell like?
prompt.da: Gnub timian mellem fingrene -- hvad dufter det af?

tasks.action: Plant raspberry canes in Bed B

prompt.en: These sticks will grow into raspberry bushes by summer!
prompt.da: De her pinde bliver til hindbaerbuske til sommer!

tasks.action: Plant chive divisions in Bed B

prompt.en: Push the chive clump into the hole and press soil around it.
prompt.da: Tryk purloegklumpen ned i hullet og tryk jorden fast.

tasks.action: Water all newly planted beds thoroughly

prompt.en: Give each new plant a big drink of water -- they're thirsty after their trip!
prompt.da: Giv hver ny plante en stor slurk vand -- de er toerstige efter turen!

tasks.action: Place painted plant markers next to each crop in Bed A

prompt.en: Put YOUR markers next to each plant so everyone knows what's growing!
prompt.da: Saet DINE markorer ved hver plante, saa alle kan se hvad der gror!

growth_events.event: Violas already blooming from nursery seedlings

prompt.en: The purple flowers are already open! Can you smell them?
prompt.da: De lilla blomster er allerede aabne! Kan du lugte dem?

growth_events.event: Lamb's ear has soft fuzzy leaves ready to touch

prompt.en: Feel how soft the lamb's ear is -- softer than velvet!
prompt.da: Maaerk hvor bloedt lammeoeret er -- bloedere end flijl!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow first succession radish seeds in Bed A
Sow first succession lettuce seeds in Bed D
Sow first spring onion seeds in Bed D
Sow pea seeds along trellis in Bed C
